overall.description: A static nighttime shot of a campfire burning in an open grassland, illuminating a nearby canvas tent and casting warm flickering light on the surrounding dry grass, with smoke rising into the dark sky. The scene captures a peaceful, isolated camping atmosphere with no camera movement.

agents.ego_description: stationary at the campsite, observing the burning campfire from a fixed position

entered.detail: burning fire with rising smoke, casting warm orange light on surroundings
dark colored tent pitched on the grass, partially illuminated by firelight
field of dry grass covering the ground, glowing in the firelight

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime scene at a campsite in an open grassland. A campfire burns steadily in the center, casting warm flickering light on the surrounding dry grass and a canvas tent pitched to the right. Smoke rises from the flames into the dark night sky, with the camera remaining completely still throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric gaze over a secluded nighttime campsite in an open grassland. It begins with a steady campfire burning in the center, casting a warm, flickering glow across the surrounding dry grass. As the flames dance, the light illuminates a canvas tent pitched to the right, grounding the scene in a sense of isolation. The view remains fixed as thin plumes of smoke rise steadily from the fire into the deep darkness of the night sky.
